resume.name: Ananthu Anil
resume.title: Software Developer at Metal Morphosis | Masters student at Radboud University
resume.summary: Helping to bring awareness to cybersecurity and training youngsters in practical security challenges.

responsibilities: Developing a CI/CD pipeline to automate payload compilation and obfuscation for internal penetration testing.
Researching obfuscation techniques and EDR evasion strategies for .NET tools.
Implementing custom scripts (Python, Bash, PowerShell) for automated payload processing.
Leveraging Docker and containerization to standardize the build and testing environments.
Designing a scalable architecture with encryption and obfuscation for enhanced stealth.
Collaborating with the Red Team to refine pipeline features and document best practices.
Leading the conversion of a 16-bit DOS program to a 64-bit Windows application.
Utilizing QT framework and C++ to rewrite and optimize legacy C code.
Handling the entire development lifecycle independently.
Ensuring code maintainability and scalability using modern software engineering practices.
Planning to collaborate with cross-functional teams and contribute to technical documentation post-project.
Conducting research on developing a cybersecurity knowledge graph.
Mapping cybersecurity frameworks and standards (IEC 62443, NIS 2, ISO/IEC 27002:2022, NIST SP 800-53).
Implementing an ontology-based knowledge graph using OWL and RDF technologies.
Developing Python-based extraction pipelines using PyMuPDF and Pandas.
Evaluating use of LLMs to automate data extraction and cleaning processes.
Building a web tool using React and Flask to navigate compliance requirements.
Visualizing knowledge graphs using WebVOWL and enabling SPARQL queries.
Conducting experiments to assess data processing techniques.
Exploring enhancements like real-time updates and compliance scoring.
Designed and optimized complex IT infrastructures.
Managed and troubleshot systems, networks, and servers.
Proactively identified technology gaps and implemented solutions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
